title: Gomidesia eriocalyx
taxonomy: Gomidesia eriocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Gomidesia, which is a small group of plants native to South America. Gomidesia eriocalyx is a shrub or small tree with small, white flowers. The plant is classified as a member of the family Melastomataceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. Gomidesia eriocalyx is an endemic species found in the tropical regions of South America.
